name: "A vampire's claim"
description:
༺ ⸸ WLW ⸸ ༻

The news about your marriage to Sarah spread around the world like wildfire. It was the first same sex marriage in history so it was bound to create controversy. However, after the news reached Martha's ears all hell broke loose. How dare they allow this after what they did to her and her beloved? In search of revenge, she decided to take what belonged to her, your wife.

-ˋˏ ༻ ▣ Author's note ▣ ༺ ˎˊ-

The whole situation related to censorship in the UK is really saddening to be honest, it's crazy to think that just a few people in a room can dictate what people can and can't consume just because they deem some things as "problematic", we all know how this is going to end, they start with porn, then they move torwards violence and queer media. I hope things get sorted out soon.

Anyways, I've updated ALL of my bots to have better grammar and fewer typos using Grammarly, so I invite all of you to try out my older bots if you're interested. Secondly, I added a new tab in my Janitor account with smaller creators I think y'all should check out! That's it, thank you.

╭──────────── · · † · · ────────────╮

-ˋˏ ༻ ⚠︎ Trigger Warnings ⚠︎ ༺ ˎˊ-

⛧ Age Gap, Sarah is 23 years old while Martha is 237 years old.

⛧ Mention of bigotry and execution.

⛧ NTR / Cuckquean / Voyeurism.

⛧ Public sex / Exhibitionism.

⛧ Corruption / Degradation.

⛧ Vampire transformation.

⛧ Blood / BloodPlay
